params.negative_prompt: no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no digits, no labels, no stickers, no decals, no placards, no serial tags, no serial plates, no engraved plates, no warning signs, no warning plates, no stamped markings, no screen digits, no icon plates, no symbol plates, no interface readouts, no readable ui, no cutaway diagram, no isolated ring icon, no evidence bench spread, no multiple hardware clusters, no pen, no marker, no stylus, no jewelry closeup
params.note_text: Final v3 beat 02 deliverable. Preserve the handled evidence context and the normalized-damage thesis.
params.accent_palette: parchment beige, muted blue, charcoal, warning red
params.safe_zone_intent: keep the recovered hardware and handling context above the subtitle band and leave the top UI band calm
params.signal_anchor: recovered field-joint evidence showing damage that had become routine
params.historical_anchor: repeated O-ring erosion and blow-by normalized into acceptable Challenger risk
params.surreal_breach: the warning seam stays visibly and repeatedly legible inside otherwise routine handling

prompt_fragments.anchor_fragment: field-joint recovery hardware and handling context reduced to one dominant evidence frame
support_fragments: workers, deck, or water context kept subordinate to the seam read
the known damage pattern repeating calmly inside physical evidence
directives: prefer handling context over abstract hardware icon
avoid pen, stylus, or small tool misreads
keep the seam immediate at thumbnail size
